architecture: x -> SiLU(x @ W1) @ W2, with W1 drawn from a seeded generator and stored as the seed, so only the readout costs bits and the fit is a closed-form ridge solve

identity_input.note: post_moe is not mostly its own input

shuffled_pairs.note: student on wrong inputs falls below the null, so the score is input-dependent

not_evidence_of: capability, full-model quality, or behaviour. One stage of one layer on 4096 held-out positions from a deterministic corpus. The residual 0.28 is unexamined and may be exactly what matters.
not_the_killed_lever: activation-weighted SVD is a recorded Type-1 kill and was not run. This replaces the architecture and removes routing entirely rather than reweighting a decomposition of the same matrices.
open: end-to-end block output with the student in place
generalisation across layers, fitted on layer 38 only
whether the residual carries the capability
readings: this is the only measurement in the campaign that beats the constant-mean null, and it does so at about one seventieth of the rate every weight-space family was given
the nonlinearity is not the source: a full linear map reaches 0.733 centered, so the random features buy compactness rather than accuracy
capacity saturates immediately, 0.724 at hidden 1024 and 0.744 at hidden 8192, so the fit is data-limited rather than budget-limited
9.84 G expert weights are approximable to 0.72 centered cosine by 37 M parameters on this distribution

scoring.disjoint: a corpus partition disjoint from every split fitted on

what: a dense student replacing the routed and shared experts of one layer, fitted against the block's output rather than against any weight matrix
